Package com.yanimetaxas.realitycheck

Class UriCheck

java.lang.Object
com.yanimetaxas.realitycheck.AbstractCheck<UriCheck,URI>
com.yanimetaxas.realitycheck.UriCheck
All Implemented Interfaces:
Check<UriCheck,URI>
public final class UriCheck extends AbstractCheck<UriCheck,URI>
Fluent assertions for URI values. Parses and inspects individual URI components without external dependencies. 

 checkThat(uri)
     .hasScheme("https")
     .hasHost("api.example.com")
     .hasPath("/v2/users")
     .hasQueryParam("page", "1");

 checkThat(URI.create(url)).isAbsolute().hasPort(443);
